goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'broxbourne' and should 'arrive by 20:30'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'mediterranean' food and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to broxbourne and should arrive by 20:30
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get departure time
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve mediterranean food and should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and phone number
